title: Nginx Request ID Forwarding & JSON Logs
description: Update nginx/agentauth.conf to support request ID correlation and structured logging. Use the $request_id variable to generate a unique ID if the client does not provide an X-Request-ID header, or pass through the client-provided value. Add X-Request-ID to the proxy_set_header directives so the FastAPI app receives it. Configure a JSON access log format that Promtail can parse, including fields: timestamp, method, path, status, request_time, upstream_response_time, request_id, remote_addr, http_user_agent.
validation: X-Request-ID header forwarded to upstream via proxy_set_header
X-Request-ID returned to client in response headers
JSON log format defined with all required fields (timestamp, method, path, status, request_time, upstream_response_time, request_id, remote_addr, http_user_agent)
Access log uses the JSON format
Promtail can parse the nginx JSON log output
